toastSafetyRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-001 Toast Safety
Prevent exposed energized
or overheating hazards.

electricalSafetyRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-002 Electrical Safety
Comply with UL 1026 / IEC
60335-2-9 safety intent.

browningRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-003 Browning Quality
Deliver selectable browning
without burning bread.

timingRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-004 Toast Timing
Release carriage when timer
or cancel event occurs.

powerRatingRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-010 Power Rating
Operate at 900-1200 W on
120 VAC / 60 Hz supply.

surfaceTemperatureRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-011 Surface Temp
Touchable surfaces <= 60 C
at max setting, 25 C ambient.

thermalCutoffRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-012 Thermal Cutoff
Open heater circuit before
external surface exceeds 90 C.

browningLevelsRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-020 Browning Levels
Provide 7 browning levels;
slot delta <= 1.5 DeltaE.

carriageReleaseRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-021 Carriage Release
Pop up within 2 s of cycle
completion or cancel.

crumbTrayForceRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-030 Crumb Tray Force
Remove tray with 5-15 N and
capture >= 90% crumbs.

cycleLifeRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-T-040 Cycle Life
Lever, latch, and carriage
survive >= 10,000 cycles.
